column1: # Rule-checkable cases (chess + ōgi), serving both as minimal golden vectors
# and as a seed for the harness. Replace or augment with vectors produced by
# a reference implementation (Ruby, Elixir, …) for a true multi-implementation
# Illegal move (no piece on a1): position unchanged.
# Uchifuzume (ōgi): dropping a Fu that mates is illegal.
# Fu drop giving a plain check (ōgi): allowed, game ongoing.
